title: Krishna Aur Balram
subTitle: Brothers Krishna and Balram, who share a loving relationship, embark on a series of adventures together in Vrindavan while battling evil forces.

title: Super Bheem
subTitle: Bumkin and Bheem collide on the way to carnival. Bumkin uses the stolen magical ring to inter-change the looks. Real Bheem is caught by the soldiers. Finally Bumkin's reality is revealed.

title: Mighty Raju
subTitle: A four-year-old Raju, who received superpowers due to a scientific blunder, decides to use them for the good of humanity.

title: Luv Kushh
subTitle: Luv and Kush, two endearing six-year-old twin brothers, live at Rishi Valmiki's ashram along with their mother, Sita, and have many adventures.

title: Chorr Police
subTitle: Anthony, a happy-go-lucky thief who lives in the slums of Mumbai, steals for the benefit of the underprivileged while constantly trying to outwit police officer Lovely Singh.

title: Krishna Balram
subTitle: Krishna and his older brother Balram share a playful and loving sibling bond. Together they embark on thrilling adventures and daring escapades with Radha.

title: Super Bheem
subTitle: 1. It's great to hear that Super Bheem and his friends were able to find the copper stones and cure the guardians' uncontrollable sneezes! Their determination and problem-solving skills paid off in the end. 2. Bheem and his friends help short.
